document_title: Schedule of Base Unit Market Values for Residential, Commercial and Industrial Lands — Paracelis

_meta.source: Provincial Assessor's Office — Paracelis Form no. 1 Office Order.docx
_meta.act: RA 12001 (Real Property Valuation and Assessment Reform Act), Section 15
notes: Corner influence: 10% for both residential and commercial lots.
C-1 description says 'along all-weather Road' without enumerating barangays — in practice this overlays the R-1 corridors (Poblacion, Bananao, Butigue).
Mirrors PARACELIS_CLASSIFICATIONS in lib/paracelis.js so the editor's class chips and the printed legend stay in sync.

items.location_description: Commercial lots located along all-weather Road.
Residential lots along National Roads within Poblacion, Bananao, and Butigue; along Basilan, Marat-Babba, and Tapinit-Licoy Provincial Roads within Poblacion.
Residential lots within the inner part of Poblacion; along the National Road within Bantay and Palitod; along the Provincial Road, Bacarri-Addang-Tawang Road, and Aba-Bacarri-Nansuso Road.
Residential lots along Municipal and Barangay Roads within Palitod, Butigue, and Bananao.
Residential lots along the Provincial Road from Poblacion to Bantay; along Municipal and Barangay Roads within Bantay and Bacarni.
Residential lots within the inner part of Bananao, Palitod, and Butigue; along the National Road within Anonat; along the Catubangan-Nanalao-Kiling Road.
Residential lots within Bantay and Bacarni; along the National Road within Anonat.
Residential lots along Barangay roads within Buringal.
Residential lots within Bunot, and within the inner parts of Buringal and Anonat.
